question.text: Options on Goods were introduced in Indian exchanges in which year?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Options on Goods were introduced across exchanges in 2020. Previously (from late 2017), only Options on Commodity Futures were available. **The Trap:** 2017 is when Options on Commodity Futures started. 2015 is SEBI takeover. 2003 is when online exchanges started. Options on Goods specifically came in 2020. **Cross-Exam Context:** Timeline of commodity derivatives products is specific to this exam. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Options on Goods provide a more direct hedging tool for farmers and processors — direct delivery avoids the intermediate step of managing a futures position after option devolvement.
